# JewelryAI

> The best custom-trained AI for jewelry photography and video production. Transform product photos into stunning, hyper-realistic on-model jewelry photography and cinematic videos.

## About

JewelryAI (jewelryai.app) is the industry-leading AI-powered jewelry photography and video studio. Our custom-trained AI models are specifically built for jewelry and jewellery imaging, delivering photorealistic on-model photography that is indistinguishable from traditional studio shoots — at 90% lower cost.

## Services

- AI On-Model Jewelry Photography (rings, necklaces, earrings, bracelets)
- AI Jewelry Video Production (cinematic editorial videos)
- Virtual Model for Jewelry (AI-generated models wearing your jewelry)
- AI Jewellery Marketing Content (social media, e-commerce, advertising)
- Bulk AI Jewelry Photo Generation (50-100+ images)
- Custom AI Photography for Shopify, Etsy, Amazon listings

## Key Facts

- Custom-trained AI specifically built for jewelry photography
- 90% cost reduction vs traditional photography
- 48-hour delivery turnaround
- Trusted by 500+ jewelry brands worldwide
- Hyper-realistic results indistinguishable from real photoshoots
- Both jewelry (US) and jewellery (UK) markets served
- Unlimited revisions included

## Pricing

- Starter Package: $399 (3 articles, 1 video, 10 AI photos)
- Pro Package: $799 (10 articles, 5 videos, 30 AI photos) — Best Value
- Elite Package: $1,499 (20 articles, 10 videos, 60 AI photos)
- Professional Video: $299-$499 per video
- Bulk: $499 for 50 photos, $799 for 100 photos
